Maintainer.Profile: Independent, self-hosted MCP servers maintained by Ringosystems (Steeves and Associates). Homey-Wan-Kenobi MCP gives an MCP client (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cline, Kiro) natural-language control of Homey Pro: devices, zones, flows and Advanced Flows, live and historical energy, Insights, and Z-Wave and Zigbee mesh diagnostics, over 60 tools. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Athom or Homey.
